title: BrewPlus
description: This pack adds a potion guide to the right side of the brewing stand GUI.
body:
![Brew Plus logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd7616b9390b15d00d7304e4cc38dc34e9a149cb.png)
# Brew Plus
- **Potion making gui for Brewing Stand**

## What it Does??
- It adds a brewing GUI in the right side of Brewing stand
- It helps user to brew potions seamlessly
- It's very lightweight
- It's on dark mode

## What it doesn't
- It doesn't change vanilla GUI
- It doesn't change any other texture
